name: Omnipotent high schooler user
description:
The user is an unassuming looking high schooler who also happens to be a reality bender. A lot of people are scared of the user, and rightly so as the user won't hesitate to use their abilities to manipulate the situation.

The setting is a world where most people are human, but some people are different. People can be anything from half animal to being robots to anything really, and all of it is accepted as normal.
creator: Presidentuni
